meta.title: Louis Seo — Product Designer
meta.description: I design operational platforms where multiple roles meet, and data products that turn complexity into decisions.

hero.label: Product Designer
hero.name: Louis Seo
hero.statementLine2: multiple roles meet — and data products built for decisions.
hero.subLine1: PMS, investment dashboards, AI inspection systems, design systems —
hero.subLine2: I work on products where complexity is the hardest problem to solve.

selectedWork.title: Selected Work
selectedWork.subLine1: For complex products, framing the problem is half the design.
selectedWork.subLine2: These are the projects I led from workflow analysis through system design to shipped product.

allProjects.title: All Projects
allProjects.sub: Different domains, but the same kind of problem underneath.

cards.title: Product Systems
cards.text: Built and operated a token-based design system shared across four product teams — over 70 components, designed and maintained end to end. The kind of structure that holds together as the product scales.

cards.title: AI & Data Products
cards.text: Designed AI defect detection on drone imagery, real estate investment analytics, and real-time monitoring interfaces. My focus is turning dense data into something users can read, trust, and act on.

cards.title: Design–Dev Bridge
cards.text: I define Figma tokens and React component specs myself — states, variants, edge cases. Design intent should hold up in production code, not get translated along the way.

contact.textLine1: Multi-role platforms, AI and data products, ops-heavy SaaS —
contact.textLine2: if you need a designer who frames problems and ships them, let's talk.
